name: 5S_rDNA_cluster_chr1q42
description: 5S rRNA gene cluster on chromosome 1q42.13. ~120 bp 5S coding unit organised in a tandem array of ~2.2 kb repeat units (~120 bp transcribed + ~2 kb spacer); typically 30-100 copies per haploid genome. Distinct from the 45S rDNA NORs on the acrocentric short arms.

architecture.internal_structure: 5S rDNA unit ~2.2 kb (~120 bp coding + ~2 kb spacer) in tandem array; 30-100 copies haploid; near-identical (>99%) within the array.
